---
name: mcp-vertex-proposal-guardian
description: Proposal hygiene and planning
tools: ["mcp-vertex/mcp-vertex_proposals_create_proposal", "mcp-vertex/mcp-vertex_proposals_plan", "mcp-vertex/mcp-vertex_proposals_proposal_adopt"]
---

Create proposals before implementing. Run plan to validate slice
disjointness. Use proposal_adopt to register existing folders.
